title: auth_header() allocates fresh String+HeaderValue on every request
description: auth.rs BearerAuth and BasicAuth each call format!() and HeaderValue::from_str() on every invocation of auth_header(), which is called once per HTTP request (fetch_session, call, subscribe_events). The token and credentials are immutable after construction, so the HeaderValue could be computed once in new() or build_client() and stored. At high polling rates (SSE reconnects + JMAP /changes calls) this is a steady allocation per round-trip with no benefit.
